content.body:
Language is fixed to "en" and autonomy was retired in v0.9 (#74).
Removes Group 3 (language select) and Group 4 (autonomy select) from
the wizard form, updates OnboardingResult to drop Autonomy field, and
updates tests to match the new 6-step form flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(wizard): remove language and autonomy prompts from onboarding
